entries.text: Activated the $7/day video-view campaign — live, promoting the Reel to build a retargeting pool.
Wired a non-expiring System User token across all automation (posts, Reels, ads) — nothing expires.
Built the paid-ads manager and staged the first campaign (broad US video-views) — paused for approval.
Published the first Reel — "3 ways shops bleed money" — voiced by ElevenLabs 'Torque Marshal'.
Built the faceless Reels engine: ElevenLabs voice → word-synced captions → ffmpeg → auto-publish.
Installed 4 autonomous agents (publisher, reels, engage, report) — running unattended on schedule.
Generated a 14-post content backlog + 5 Reel scripts across the high-performing trade archetypes.
Optimized the Facebook page (About, description, link) via API + generated brand profile & cover graphics.
Published the first post and verified the Graph API pipeline end-to-end.
Built & deployed the website — landing page + link-in-bio hub (hi-vis 'for the trades' identity).
Locked the growth strategy from real practitioner research (Reels = engine, owned Group = nurture, $5–10/day retargeting).
Brand created: Booked Job — an independent content brand for service pros, soft-funneling to Consent Resolve.
